S.FORM: Steve Bracey sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1950 , ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 8, Steve Bracey, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2006) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

(mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
